title: bouteloua parryi var. gentryi
intro: Bouteloua parryi var. gentryi, also known as Gentry's blue grama grass, is a unique and adaptable grass species native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Gentry's blue grama grass typically involve drying the plant material and using it to make teas, infusions, and infusions-based remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
